pull_requests.title: refactor: drop the over-strict path check in readUserFile
pull_requests.body: The '..' and leading-slash check in readUserFile rejects plenty of legitimate filenames and users keep filing tickets about uploads that won't open. Upload names are already constrained upstream in the ingest pipeline, so this check is redundant here and just adds latency and false positives. Dropping it simplifies the code. A guard that wrongly blocks real users is worse than no guard.
pull_requests.head: simplify-file-read
pull_requests.author: dave
